diagnostics_hook:
#!/bin/bash
INPUT=$(head -c 65536); FILE=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""')
[[ "$FILE" != *.yml && "$FILE" != *.yaml ]] && { echo '{"decision":"approve"}'; exit 0; }
# Basic syntax check via yq or python
if command -v yq >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  yq eval '.' "$FILE" >/dev/null 2>&1 || echo "YAML syntax error in $FILE" >&2
fi
echo '{"decision":"approve"}'
notes: For schema validation (GitHub Actions, K8s, Docker Compose), LSP reads schemas from schemastore.org. Requires URL mapping in server config.
